description:
Advances: mutagen.json_schema, mutagen.coverage

Deferred from mutagen-wrd.26.

## Why this exists

mutagen-wrd.26 cached `Macro.to_string(r.original_ast)` and aliased the
result into both `mutation.results[].before` and `.before_source`,
fixing the duplicate-compute waste at lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex
render_result/1. That's the v1 status quo minus the redundancy.

However, the AstCache module's @moduledoc (lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex)
documents `before_source` as a **verbatim source slice** —
byte-identical bytes from the originally-parsed source file taken by
`{line, column, end_line, end_column}` from AST node metadata, NOT a
re-serialisation via `Macro.to_string/1`. The two binaries are
byte-equal today but the contract differs (re-serialised vs. verbatim
slice).

mutagen-wrd.26 did not implement the verbatim slice path because:

1. Implementing it requires extending `MutagenEx.MutationEnumerator.Site`
   to carry `end_line` and `end_column` (currently only `line` and
   `column` are stored). That file is OUT OF SCOPE in mutagen-wrd.26's
   Allowed touches.
2. The enumerator's `walk_tree/6` already inspects `:closing` / token
   metadata in some forms; the extension is straightforward but a
   non-local change with its own test surface.

## Deliverable

- Extend `MutagenEx.MutationEnumerator.Site` with `end_line` and
  `end_column` fields (best-effort from AST metadata; `nil` when
  unavailable — see Out of Scope below).
- Thread the AstCache `source_text` into the runner result so the
  reporter can slice it.
- Update `render_result/1` (lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex) to compute
  `before_source` as the verbatim source slice from `source_text` and
  `{line, column, end_line, end_column}` when end positions are
  available; fall back to `Macro.to_string(r.original_ast)` when
  metadata is missing (bare-literal sites + some macro-expanded
  forms).
- Update `.spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md` r4 + r12 to document the
  verbatim-slice behaviour AND keep the call-count cap from .26.
- Add tests that prove `before_source` is byte-identical to a
  hand-cut `{line, column, end_line, end_column}` slice of the
  original source for both 3-tuple and atomic-literal site shapes.

## Allowed touches
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex (Site struct + walker
  end-position threading)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex (carry source_text + end positions
  through to results)
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (verbatim-slice rendering in render_result/1)
- .spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md, mutation_enumeration.spec.md
- test/mutagen_ex/* (new + extended tests)
- Golden fixtures may need regeneration if before_source diverges
  from Macro.to_string output

## Out of Scope
- Bare-literal sites where the enumerator attributes the site to a
  PARENT operator's metadata (literal mutator's bare-value clauses);
  there's no enclosing AST node to slice from. The fallback
  Macro.to_string path remains for these.
- Multi-line spanning sites whose AST metadata does not carry a
  reliable end position (some macro-expanded forms).

## Merge gate
- [ ] mix test green
- [ ] Test: 3-tuple AST site verbatim slice matches a hand-cut
      source slice (e.g. `a + b` from `lib/lane_fixture/arith.ex`)
- [ ] Test: bare-literal site falls back to Macro.to_string gracefully
- [ ] Test: Macro.to_string call-count cap from r12 still holds
- [ ] Golden fixtures regenerated and reviewed
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED
Session: 866c9970-ee52-41f7-b573-aa2ec26231c0
Log: ~/.claude-personal/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/866c9970-ee52-41f7-b573-aa2ec26231c0.jsonl

Commit: f79e9c3
Stage worktree: /Users/mz/dev/mz/mutagen_ex-verbatim-source-slice (branch mutagen-wrd.34/verbatim-source-slice off epic/mutagen-wrd @ e176ff5)

Files touched:
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex (Site struct + compute_end_position/1 + delimiterless-form whitelist)
- lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex (thread source_text + end positions through to each result)
- lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex (render_result/1 verbatim slice path + slice_source/5 + leftmost_descendant_position/1)
- lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex (@moduledoc update — drop "v1 doesn't use source_text")
- .spec/specs/json_schema.spec.md (r4 + r12 + s9 updated for verbatim-slice contract)
- .spec/specs/mutation_enumeration.spec.md (new r8 + s8 for end-position derivation)
- test/mutagen_ex/mutagen_task_render_test.exs (7 new tests, +217 lines)
- test/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator_test.exs (3 new tests under r8/s8, test helper updated for token_metadata: true)
- test/mutagen_ex/golden/*.json (6 fixtures regenerated for indented case/if blocks now slicing source verbatim)

Tests added:
- Mix.Tasks.MutagenRenderTest "r12 fallback: when end_line/end_column are nil, before_source aliases before" (5 tests, 1 new)
- Mix.Tasks.MutagenRenderTest "r4 slice: before_source is a verbatim source slice when end positions are available" (4 tests, all new — covers 3-tuple arith, formatting-preservation falsifier, no Macro.to_string-on-slice-path, bare-literal fallback)
- Mix.Tasks.MutagenRenderTest "r12 hard cap: Macro.to_string is invoked at most 2 * R times across R results" (1 test, new)
- Mix.Tasks.MutagenRenderTest "end-to-end r4 + r8: real arith.ex parse → enumerate → render" (1 test, new — the ticket's canonical `a + b` slice equality test)
- MutagenEx.MutationEnumeratorTest "r8 / s8 — end position derivation for verbatim source slice" (3 tests, all new — 3-tuple arith, bare-literal nil end, rightmost-bare-literal nil end)

Verification stubs flipped: none. mutagen.json_schema.v6 (mix test test/mutagen_ex/mutagen_task_render_test.exs) was already execute: true from .26; it still passes against the new contract and now also covers r4's slice/fallback split. mutagen.mutation_enumeration.v1 covers the new r8 transitively via mutation_enumerator_test.exs.

Audit-expanded scope: none (iteration 1).

Deferred must requirements: none.

Local sanity:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors: clean
- mix test: 492 tests, 0 failures (15 excluded)
- mix test --include e2e_slow: 505 tests, 0 failures (2 excluded). The "1 failure" lines that appear inside e2e_slow output are mutation runs reporting their own mutated suites — by design.

Summary: Extended MutationEnumerator.Site with optional end_line/end_column derived best-effort from AST metadata (:end_of_expression / :closing / :end, with a delimiterless-infix-operator fallback that walks to the rightmost sized descendant). MutationRunner threads source_text + end positions through to each result; render_result/1 now produces before_source as a verbatim slice of source_text between original_ast's leftmost-descendant position and {end_line, end_column} when both are non-nil, otherwise falling back to aliasing the Macro.to_string binary already computed for before. The 2*R Macro.to_string call-count cap from r12 continues to hold because the slice path uses byte indexing — slice cost is String.split + Enum.slice + Enum.join, never Macro.to_string. Spec r4 / r12 / s9 + new r8 / s8 document the contract.

title: Verbatim source slice for mutation.results[].before_source
